chosen_action.title: Stop measurement-hold follow-through from resurfacing already-delivered StackOverflow packets

why_this_action.summary: The audit still showed primary-repo-flat and same-family overlap as the live failures, but the hold executor could misstate the next do-now lane by re-surfacing a StackOverflow packet that had already been manually delivered in the current review window.
shared_findings_used: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: active failures are still primary_repo_flat and same_family_publisher_overlap
drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet currently exists in this review window
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_2026-05-28_stackoverflow_manual_delivery.json: StackOverflow packet already delivered in the current window
agents/marketing/logs/reddit_execution_status_latest.json: Reddit remains execution-blocked, so false StackOverflow resurfacing can distort the only honest follow-through surface

result.summary: Patched measurement-hold follow-through so it suppresses StackOverflow resurfacing when the packet was already manually delivered or a current-window post-cooldown rerun is already logged, added regression coverage, and re-ran the audit.
